settings.editor: Everything you need to know before booking your Dubai desert adventure — from dune-bashing safety to hot-air balloon weather windows.

settings.editor: These six come up in roughly every phone call. If yours isn't here, browse the full library below or ping us on WhatsApp — we reply in under five minutes.

settings.title: How do I book a desert safari?

settings.editor: Book online in under two minutes, message us on WhatsApp, or call — we confirm same-day with a hotel pickup time.

settings.title: Is the safari safe for families?

settings.editor: DTCM-trained drivers, roll cages, four-point belts, monthly vehicle inspections, and booster seats for kids 3–12.

settings.title: What should I wear in the desert?

settings.editor: Light layers, closed-toe shoes, a jacket for winter evenings. We provide headscarves and hats on request.
Complimentary pickup across Dubai — Marina, JBR, Downtown, Palm, Deira, Business Bay, and more.

settings.title: What's the minimum age for a buggy?

settings.editor: Drivers 16+ with a valid licence; passengers 6+ and 120 cm. 2-seater Can-Ams fit parent + child rides.
Full refund 24+ hours ahead. Free rescheduling up to 6 hours before pickup, subject to availability.
Use the tabs above to filter by category, or scroll through the whole set. Click any question to expand.

tabs.tab_title: How do I book a Dubai desert safari?
tabs.tab_content:
Booking takes under two minutes. You have three options:

  • Online — booking.safaridesertdubai.com, pay by card, Apple Pay, or PayPal.
  • WhatsApp — +971 52 440 9525, average reply time 4 minutes, 7 days a week.
  • Phone — +971 52 447 2719, 08:00–23:00 Gulf time.

You will receive a confirmation email and WhatsApp message with your driver's name and pickup window within 15 minutes.

tabs.tab_title: Which payment methods do you accept?
tabs.tab_content:
All major cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal online, and cash in AED, USD, EUR, or GBP at pickup.

For your security: we never ask for card details over WhatsApp or phone. Any payment link you receive will be from booking.safaridesertdubai.com only — verify the domain before entering card info.

Yes — complimentary round-trip pickup is included from Marina, JBR, Downtown, Palm Jumeirah, Deira, Business Bay, and Dubai South. Pickup is in a private 4×4; we will WhatsApp your driver's live location 15 minutes before arrival.

Pickups from outside central Dubai:

  • Sharjah — AED 75
  • Ajman — AED 100
  • Abu Dhabi — AED 150

tabs.tab_title: Is the desert safari safe for families and children?
tabs.tab_content:
Yes, and we take it seriously. Every element is regulated by the Dubai Department of Tourism and Commerce Marketing (DTCM).

  • Drivers — DTCM-licensed, minimum 5 years dune-driving experience, annual refresher certification.
  • Vehicles — Land Cruisers and Lexus LX inspected monthly, roll cages, four-point seatbelts, dual airbags.
  • Children — under 3 ride free on a parent's lap; ages 3–12 get booster seats we provide.
  • Medical — every driver carries a stocked first-aid kit; our desert camp has a resident paramedic 16:00–22:00.

tabs.tab_title: What should I wear for a desert safari?
tabs.tab_content:
Light, breathable clothing and closed-toe shoes (sandals fill with sand quickly). Sunglasses and SPF 30+ are a good idea during the day.

Evening safaris: temperatures drop to around 15°C in winter (Nov–Feb) once the sun sets. Bring a light jacket or jumper. We provide complimentary headscarves, shemaghs, and sun hats on request at pickup — just ask your driver.

tabs.tab_title: What's the minimum age and height for a dune buggy?
tabs.tab_content:
Drivers must be 16 or older and hold a valid driving licence (any country). Passengers must be 6 or older and at least 120 cm tall to clear the harness.

Our two-seater Can-Am Maverick X3 is perfect for a parent + child combo; for solo adrenaline, choose a Polaris RZR 1000. All rides include helmets, gloves, goggles, a 15-minute briefing, and a lead guide on a supervised track.

tabs.tab_title: What does the evening safari include?
tabs.tab_content:
Our flagship 6-hour evening experience covers the full Bedouin-camp arc. Pickup to drop-off:

  • 45 minutes of dune-bashing on the Lahbab red dunes
  • Sandboarding on a signature 60° slope
  • A short camel ride through the reserve
  • Henna, Arabic coffee, and fresh dates at the camp
  • A 4-course BBQ buffet with vegetarian, vegan, and halal options
  • Three live shows — Tanoura, belly dance, and fire performance
  • Shisha corner (smoking optional) and open-sky stargazing

tabs.tab_title: Are vegetarian, vegan, and halal meals available?
tabs.tab_content:
All three, yes — plus gluten-free, Jain, and Kosher-style options with 12 hours' notice. All meat served at the camp is 100% halal, sourced from UAE-certified butchers.

Tell us at booking, or WhatsApp your dietary needs the morning of your tour and we will confirm with the camp kitchen.

tabs.tab_title: How much does a private desert safari cost?
tabs.tab_content:
Private tours start from AED 950 for up to 6 guests — this is the vehicle + driver/guide, not per person. It is the cheapest way to go private if you are travelling in a group.

Our most popular upgrade is the Premium Private Evening Safari at AED 1,450, which adds reserved camp seating, unlimited soft drinks and juices, a private camp photographer, and priority camel access.

tabs.tab_title: Do I need experience to ride a quad bike?
tabs.tab_content:
No experience needed. We run a 10-minute briefing covering throttle, brakes, body position on the dunes, and hand signals — then you ride in a supervised group behind a lead guide on a beginner-friendly track.

Two engine sizes are available: automatic 250cc for first-timers, 350cc for returning riders or experienced hands. Helmet, gloves, goggles, and a dust mask are included; closed-toe shoes required.

tabs.tab_title: Is the hot-air balloon ride weather-dependent?
tabs.tab_content:
Yes. Balloons fly from October through April only — summer winds and heat make it unsafe. On your flight day, the chief pilot confirms the go/no-go at 04:00 based on live wind and thermal readings.

If we cancel for weather, you choose: a full refund or a free reschedule to any available date. Flights take off pre-sunrise and last 45–60 minutes in the air, reaching around 4,000 feet over the Dubai Desert Conservation Reserve.

tabs.tab_title: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
tabs.tab_content:
Flexible as we can reasonably be:

  • Full refund if cancelled 24+ hours before pickup.
  • 50% refund for same-day cancellations — this covers the driver call-out and reserved camp seating.
  • Free rescheduling any time until 6 hours before pickup, subject to availability.

Weather cancellations (our side) are always 100% refundable or a free reschedule — your call.

settings.editor: Our team replies on WhatsApp in under five minutes, every day of the year. Ask us anything — itineraries, dietary needs, private pricing, last-minute weather calls.
